---
title: "Stochastyczne modele układów oddziałujących"
description: "semestr letni 2024/2025"
semester: "2025/2026"
image: "SMUO.png"
---

## Aktualności

  - Sylabus (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/165Vz6Od0jaqARu172sE2bnapvEbkVEEe/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)

  - Reklama wykładu (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/01_Wstep_01_pre" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1jKqRW3htj_J3gKqdWlHG_GHCLYS7UMp0/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
  
## Zadania domowe

  - Zadanie 1: termin 31.10.2024 (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/smso_2024_zadanie1.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/smso_2024_zadanie1.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
  
  - Zadanie 2: termin 12.12.2024 (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/zadanie2/smso-2024_zadanie2.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/zadanie2/smso-2024_zadanie2" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">) (ostatnia aktualizacja 3.12.24)</span>
  
  - Zadanie 3: termin 5.12.2024
  
  - Zadanie 4: termin 16.01.2025 (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/zadanie4/smso-2024_zadanie4.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/zadanie4/smso-2024_zadanie4" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
  
## Notatki
  
  - Wykład 1:  łańcuchy Markowa w czasie ciągłym (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyk%C5%82ad-1-%C5%82a%C5%84cuchy-markowa-w-czasie-ci%C4%85g%C5%82ym.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyklad1/SMUO_wyklad1.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
    
  - Wykład 2: mocna własność Markowa (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyk%C5%82ad-2-mocna-w%C5%82asno%C5%9B%C4%87-markowa.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyklad2/SMUO_wyklad2.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
    
  - Wykład 3: procesy i półgrupy Fellera </span><span class="C9DxTc " style="font-variant: normal;"> (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyk%C5%82ad-3-procesy-i-p%C3%B3%C5%82grupy-fellera.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="font-variant: normal;">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyklad3/SMUO_wyklad3.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="font-variant: normal;">)
    
 - Wykład 4 (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyk%C5%82ad-4-generatory.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="font-variant: normal;">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyklad4/SMUO_wyklad4.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="font-variant: normal;">)
   
 - Wykład 5: Od generatora do półgrupy (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyk%C5%82ad-5-od-generatora-do-p%C3%B3%C5%82grupy.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyklad5/SMUO_wyklad5.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
   
 - Wykład 6: Od półgrupy do procesu (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyk%C5%82ad-6-od-generatora-przez-p%C3%B3%C5%82grup%C4%99-do-procesu.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyklad6/SMUO_wyklad6.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
   
 - Wykład 7: Rozkłady stacjonarne i zaburzenia ruchu Browna (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyk%C5%82ad-7-rozk%C5%82ady-stacjonarne-zaburzenia-ruchu-browna.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyklad7/SMUO_wyklad7.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
   
 - Wykład 8: Układy spinowe (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyk%C5%82ad-8-uk%C5%82ady-spinowe.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyklad8/SMUO_wyklad8.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
   
 - Wykład 9: konstrukcja układów spinowych (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyk%C5%82ad-9-konstrukcja-system%C3%B3w-spinowych.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
   
 - Wykład 10: procesy dualne (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyk%C5%82ad-10-procesy-dualne.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
   
 - Wykład 11: The Voter model: przypadek rekurencyjny (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyk%C5%82ad-11-the-voter-model-przypadek-rekurencyjny.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
   
 - Wykład 12: The Voter model: przypadek tranzytywny (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyk%C5%82ad-12-the-voter-model-przypadek-tranzytywny.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
   
 - Wykład 13: Epidemia (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/wyk%C5%82ad-13-epidemia.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
   
## Listy zadań

  - Łańcuchy Markowa w czasie dyskretnym (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/smso_2024_lista1" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1T6Ge67cyJU0-UCKfysqyg5WOagdffS2H/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
  
  - Łańcuchy Markowa w czasie ciągłym (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/smso_2024_lista2" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1hDRM_qyiahqnM3cjN8U0z73SsymA5cLc/view?usp=sharing" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
  
  - Procesy i półgrupy Fellera </span><span class="C9DxTc " style="font-variant: normal;">(</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/smso_2024_lista3.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="font-variant: normal;">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/smso_2024_lista3.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="font-variant: normal;">)
  
  - Generatory (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/smuo_2024_lista4.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
  
  - Generator a proces (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/SMUO_lista5.html" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/SMUO_lista5.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
  
  - Kilka zaginionych faktów (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/lista6/SMUO_lista6" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/lista6/SMUO_lista6.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
  
  - lista 7 (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/lista7/SMUO_lista7" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/lista7/SMUO_lista7.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
  
  - Systemy niezależnych cząstek</span><span class="C9DxTc " style="font-variant: normal;"> (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/lista8/smso_2024_lista8" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="font-variant: normal;">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/lista8/smso_2024_lista8.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="font-variant: normal; text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="font-variant: normal;">)
  
  - the Voter model (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/lista9/smso_2024_lista9" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/lista9/smso_2024_lista9.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
  
  - Epidemia (</span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/lista10/smso_2024_lista10" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">html</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">, </span><a class="XqQF9c" href="https://pdyszewski.github.io/ips/lista10/smso_2024_lista10.pdf" target="_blank" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none;"><span class="C9DxTc aw5Odc " style="text-decoration: underline;">pdf</span></a><span class="C9DxTc " style="">)
